Video.summary: Did you know the biggest difference between Ponies and Mini Horses are the height? Ponies are under 58 inches while mini horses are under 34 inches tall!
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Ponies

Video.summary: Did you know that there are 260 types of monkeys in the world?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Monkeys

Video.summary: Did you know that Pigs can trot up to 11 miles per hour ?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Pigs

Video.summary: Did you know that baby dogs were called whelps until the late 16th century?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Pups

Video.summary: Did you know that Ducks cannot contract parasites like fleas or ticks?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Wild Birds

Image.alt: TPC That's My Pet | Wild Birds
TPC That's My Pet | Wild Birds
TPC That's My Pet | Wild Birds

Video.summary: Did you know that Chameleons have the fastest tongues of any animal?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Reptiles

Video.summary: Did you know that Golden Retrievers can take 300-400 breaths per minute?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Retrievers

Video.summary: Did you know that cockatoos live for 60 years?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Psittacine Special

Image.alt: TPC That's My Pet | Psittacine Special
TPC That's My Pet | Psittacine Special
TPC That's My Pet | Psittacine Special

Video.summary: Did you know that Beagles were bred for hunting?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Beagle

Video.summary: Did you know that the oldest squirrel fossil on record dates back 11.6 million years?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Pocket Pets

Image.alt: TPC That's My Pet | Pocket Pets
TPC That's My Pet | Pocket Pets
TPC That's My Pet | Pocket Pets
